2023 BMW 740d (G70) | xDrive | White | Black Interior
Body Type: Full-Size Luxury Executive Sedan
Fuel Type: Diesel
Engine: 3.0L Inline-6 Turbocharged Diesel
Hybrid System: 48V Mild Hybrid Technology
Power: Approx. 300 hp
Torque: Approx. 670 Nm
Transmission: 8-Speed Steptronic Automatic
Drive: All-Wheel Drive (xDrive)
0–100 km/h: Approx. 5.8 seconds

Exterior Colour: White
Interior: Black Extended Merino Leather

Performance & Chassis
* 3.0L Turbocharged Inline-6 Diesel Engine
* 48V Mild Hybrid Assist for smoother acceleration
* Adaptive Air Suspension on All Four Corners
* Integral Active Steering (Rear-Wheel Steering)
* Driving Experience Control with Multiple Drive Modes
* Near-Silent Executive Ride Comfort

Interior & Comfort
* Executive Lounge Rear Seating Package
* Front & Rear Massage Seats
* Heated & Ventilated Front and Rear Seats
* Power Adjustable Seats with Memory
* Four-Zone Automatic Climate Control
* Soft-Close Automatic Doors
* Ambient Interior Lighting with Custom Themes
* Panoramic Glass Roof
* Rear Center Console with Touch Controls
* Acoustic Double-Glazed Windows

Unique 7-Series Exclusive Features
* BMW Theatre Screen (31-Inch 8K Rear Display)
* Amazon Fire TV Built-In
* Rear Door Touch Control Panels
* Swarovski Crystal Interior Controls
* BMW Interaction Bar (Light + Touch Interface)
* Automatic Doors with Remote Opening/Closing
* Active Noise Cancellation Cabin Technology
* Executive Rear Footrest
* Illuminated Panoramic Sky Lounge Roof
* Hands-Free Power Boot

Technology & Infotainment
* BMW Curved Display (Digital Cluster + Infotainment)
* iDrive 8 Operating System
* Apple CarPlay & Android Auto (Wireless)
* Premium Surround Sound System
* Wireless Phone Charging
* Head-Up Display
* Voice & Gesture Control
* Navigation with Augmented Reality

Safety & Driver Assistance
* Adaptive Cruise Control
* Lane Keep Assist
* Blind Spot Monitoring
* Front & Rear Collision Warning
* Automatic Emergency Braking
* 360° Surround View Camera
* Parking Assistant Plus
* Self-Parking Capability

𝐓𝐨𝐲𝐨𝐭𝐚 𝐋𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐂𝐫𝐮𝐢𝐬𝐞𝐫 𝟐𝟎𝟎 𝐒𝐞𝐫𝐢𝐞𝐬 𝐒𝐚𝐡𝐚𝐫𝐚 𝟐𝟎𝟏𝟗 | 𝐓𝐡𝐞 𝐔𝐥𝐭𝐢𝐦𝐚𝐭𝐞 𝐀𝐥𝐥-𝐓𝐞𝐫𝐫𝐚𝐢𝐧 𝐋𝐞𝐠𝐞𝐧𝐝 👑

* Torque: 650 Nm

* Color: Silver Metallic (Exterior) | Premium Black Leather Interior

* 7-Seater Configuration with Premium Leather Upholstery

* Cooler Box: Integrated Center Console Refrigerator
* Wood-Grain Trim: Steering Wheel and Interior Accents

* Memory System: Driver’s Seat, Steering Wheel, and Mirrors
​🔹 Extra Features:
* Kinetic Dynamic Suspension System (KDSS)
* Multi-Terrain Select (MTS) & Crawl Control

* Power Sunroof
* 360° Multi-Terrain Monitor (4-Camera Surround View)
* Toyota Safety Sense: Pre-Collision System, Pedestrian Detection, & Adaptive Cruise Control
* Blind Spot Monitoring & Rear Cross-Traffic Alert
* Bi-LED Headlights with Auto High Beam & DRLs
* 18” Alloy Wheels with All-Terrain Capability
* Powered Tailgate (Upper Section)
​Available at Alhusnain Motors Ltd
📍 Ngong Road, Malik Heights Building
📞 0702400400
